scripts.dev:api: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project services/api uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir services/api --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.api:test: uv run --project services/api --extra dev python -m pytest services/api/tests
scripts.worker:test: uv run --project services/worker --extra dev python -m pytest services/worker/tests
scripts.check: npm run api:test && npm run worker:test && npm run lint:web && npm run build:web
